examples: Anthony still faces a defamation lawsuit from Zenaida Fernandez-Gonzalez, of nearby Kissimmee, Florida.
His partner in the pas de deux is Zenaida Yanowsky, the French-born ballerina whose long limbs languidly wrap around Mr Acosta.
Vanya finished tied for 5th after misspelling "zenaida, " a type of pigeon.
